variants: Fenglei Xiang is a recognized expert in the field of Speech Pathology and was honored with the Kinetic Lore Commendation for her contributions to the field. She is also known for her authored work titled the Umbrellis Matrix Guide, which has been widely referenced by her peers. In addition to her professional endeavors, Fenglei is an active member of the Runebound Watchmakers, a society that fosters innovation and craftsmanship. During her academic journey, she was mentored by Reyes Cifuentes, whose guidance was instrumental in her development. Her interdisciplinary approach continues to inspire others in her specialization.

Through her work, she aims to transform the ways individuals engage with speech and language.
